items.title: 2 Button Harbinger Power 31.9k
items.rotation:
Rotation is dagger 2, shroud, shroud 2. Make sure to cast dagger 2 right before
              and right after you enter/exit shroud.

              Precast elite skill and/or heal skill for blight stacks. You can run golem instead if you need CC. However
              recasting heal/elite can be helpful if you lose blight during boss phases for example.

              Also I realized that you should cast elite into heal for 20 stacks of blight at start instead of 15,
              ignore that mistake. Anyway you should probably run golem + just precast heal skill.
items.explanation:
This is a beginner/low intensity necromancer build for fractal/raid/strike
              content.

items.title: 4 Button Harbinger Power 34.3k
items.rotation:
Opener is both wells into dagger 2 into shroud into shroud 2 spam.

              Rotation is basically dagger 2 when you exit shroud, both wells, auto attack until dagger 2 comes up, cast
              dagger 2 before you enter shroud, spam shroud 2. Repeat.

              Precast elite skill and/or heal skill for blight stacks. You can run golem instead if you need CC. However
              recasting heal/elite can be helpful if you lose blight during boss phases for example.

              Also I realized that you should cast elite into heal for 20 stacks of blight at start instead of 15,
              ignore that mistake. Anyway you should probably run golem + just precast heal skill.
items.explanation:
This is a beginner/low intensity necromancer build for fractal/raid/strike
              content.

items.title: 4 Button Harbinger Condi 32k Parasitic Contagion
items.rotation:
Opener is heal skill into elite into shroud into shroud 2 spam.

              Rotation is pistol 2 into focus 4 into elite (if available) into focus 4 into pistol 2 into maybe focus 4
              if it's up into shroud and shroud 2 spam. Repeat.
items.explanation:
This is a beginner/low intensity necromancer build for fractal/raid/strike
              content.

              I had a lot of problems with necromancer surprisingly. I think this is maybe still a little undercooked
              and I may come back to this. I think necromancer is generally "faceroll" where you want to cast all of
              your skills so it's kind of hard to "condense" that into a few clicks.

              Basically the problem is that 2 buttons are always shroud, shroud 2 (and weapon skill 2). Either condition
              elite is better than BiP from my testing so that's the 3rd button. So 4th button has to be life force
              generation I think... hence why I ran parasitic contagion. We can't fit in corruptions well. Life force
              generation was lacking hard so I ran focus which I think is best for life force regen in this scenario.

              Dagger main hand ended up being low damage. I think the lack of conditions during non shroud periods loses
              hard. Basically dagger had a damage problem rather than a life force problem and it was hard to fix so I
              gave up on it. I try to aim for my builds to be 30k+ dps.

              Let me know if you have any ideas for improving it! I may come back to it later. At least the nice thing
              is that with Parasitic Contagion you will be very healthy.
